name: Shape a Peanut Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and peanut butter together.
2. Stir in the sugar and egg.
3. Beat in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Knead the dough a few times on a floured surface.
5. Cut the dough into 40 equal pieces.
6. Shape each piece with your hands into a roll that is 2 1/2 inches long and 3/4 inch in diameter.
7. Pinch the center of each roll to form a small indentation.
8. Place the shaped cookies on a baking sheet.
9. Flatten the top of each cookie slightly.
10. Round one end of the cookie and pinch the other end to resemble the shape of a peanut inside its shell.
11. Using the back of a knife, cut shallow crisscross lines on top of each cookie.
12. Ensure the cookies are at least 2 inches apart on the baking sheet, as they will spread during baking.
13. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes.
